slides.title: Coffee and green tea, in *gentle moderation*.
slides.sub: Both are linked to longevity in large studies. A few cups a day suits many people, though it is individual.

slides.title: Linked to longevity
slides.body: Coffee and green tea are *linked to longevity* in large studies. Two of the world's favorite drinks may quietly help.

slides.title: Rich in plant compounds
slides.body: Both are *rich in polyphenols and antioxidants*. These plant compounds are part of why the studies look favorable.

slides.title: Skip the sugar and late cups
slides.body: Keep them mostly unsweetened, and *mind late-day caffeine* so your sleep stays good. Sugar and bad sleep cancel the benefit.

slides.title: A few cups a day
slides.body: A few cups a day *suits many people*, though caffeine is individual. Listen to your own body and adjust.

slides.title: An easy habit to keep
slides.body: This is a *pleasant, low-effort habit* to keep. No new routine to force, just a small daily ritual you already enjoy.

slides.title: Keep the small habits that *support longevity*.
slides.body: Vibe Health scores your sleep, food, water and steps together, so good daily habits show up in one clear Health Score.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store

caption:
Coffee and green tea are linked to longevity in large studies, thanks in part to their polyphenols and antioxidants. ☕

Keep them mostly unsweetened and mind late-day caffeine so sleep stays good. A few cups a day suits many people, though it is individual. A pleasant, low-effort habit. Save this. 🔖

Vibe Health turns your daily habits into one Health Score → link in bio.
